creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
1 Upstream the sqlite3-ruby gem has changed it's name to just sqlite3.

2 If we update databases/rubygem-sqlite3 to 1.3.3,
it will break 	www/rubygem-rails-app-installer and then break www/typo,
because  www/rubygem-rails-app-installer require rubygem-sqlite3-ruby

3 For the compatibility, I suggest repocopy databases/rubygem-sqlite3
--> databases/rubygem-sqlite3-ruby,
